what: FlyDSL t16x128x128_atomic stage2 for d=2048 (smaller tile_n=128 with tile_m=16)
why: v134 showed tile_m=16 helps d=2048. Combining tile_m=16 + tile_n=128 for potentially better performance.
override: New tile combination t16x128x128 never tried before. tile_m=16 was proven in v134, and tile_n=128 was proven in v52. This is a novel combination.

what: FlyDSL t16x128x128_atomic stage2 for bs512/E33/d=512 (tile_m=16 for d=512)
why: tile_m=16 helped d=2048 in v134. Try same optimization for d=512 which currently uses tile_m=32.
override: Never tried tile_m=16 for d=512 shape. tile_m=16 was proven for d=2048 in v134. Different shape dimension.

what: FlyDSL t16x128x128 stage2 for BOTH d=512 AND d=2048
why: v137 BM showed d=512 improved 126->112us with tile_m=16. v136 showed d=2048 at noise-level parity. Combine both for cumulative improvement.
override: Combines two independently validated changes: tile_m=16 for d=512 (v137 BM: -11% on shape) and tile_m=16 for d=2048 (v134 winner). Never tried both together.

what: FlyDSL t16x128x256_atomic stage2 for d=512 (tile_k=256 instead of 128)
why: v138 improved d=512 with tile_m=16. Now try tile_k=256 (2 K-iterations for K=512) vs tile_k=128 (4 iterations). Fewer iterations means less loop overhead.
override: t16x128x256 for d=512 never tried. tile_m=16 proven in v138, now varying tile_k dimension. Different from t32x128x256 which was the default tile size.

what: FlyDSL t16x256x256_atomic stage2 for d=2048 (standard tile_n=256, tile_k=256 with tile_m=16)
why: v134 used t16x256x128 for d=2048. Try the 'natural' large tile (256x256) that matches CK default, but with tile_m=16 for M-parallelism. For K=2048, tile_k=256 means 8 iterations.
override: t16x256x256 for d=2048 never tried. All previous tile_m=16 variants used tile_k=128. This combines tile_m=16 with the full tile_k=256.

what: cktile_moe ksplit=2 for bs512/E257 instead of CK 2-stage + NT=True
why: v22 tried cktile ksplit=2 for bs=512/E=257 but was +2.1% worse at the time. Since then, many other changes may have shifted the landscape. Also secret LB seems to weight shapes differently. Re-evaluate.
override: v22 was 130+ versions ago with completely different d=512 and d=2048 configs. The current baseline has changed dramatically. Re-evaluating for current code.

what_failed: FlyDSL tile variations (t16x128x256, t16x256x256, cktile for E257/bs512)
